title: Delizie Di Calabria Cherry Peppers With Pecorino Cheese 270 gr.
description: Delizie di Calabria Cherry Peppers with Pecorino Cheese (270 g) pairs plump Calabrian cherry peppers pleasantly mild-hot with a generous core of tangy, sheep's-milk Pecorino, creating a poised contrast of bright heat and creamy, savoury richness; preserved for serving convenience (typically in sunflower oil, with seasoning and a touch of wine vinegar), they're an instant, elegant antipasto for aperitivo boards, and equally brilliant sliced over pizza, folded through pasta, or scattered onto salads for a vivid, Southern-Italian finish.
